data.hero_title_main:
From prototype to production, 
without friction.
data.heading_text: We merge design, manufacturing, and automation into one integrated process so customers can develop, validate, and scale breakthrough composite structures faster and with less risk.
data.two_column_text_1_title:
Prove Fast. Move Fast. 
Scale With Certainty.

two_column_text_1_text.text:
You start in our flexible factories, where parts are designed and prototyped quickly.
All processing routes are available: RTS automated deposition (steered fiber or conventional), forming and curing (autoclave, press, RTM, HDF), machining, painting, and inspection.

Once validated, we deploy a dedicated production line near your facility, with no upfront CapEx, and transition seamlessly to industrial production.

This is the revolution: a manufacturing model designed for rapid innovation and long-term scalability.

two_column_text_2_list.heading: Discover
two_column_text_2_list.text: Explore designs, steering strategies, and geometries with RTS and digital tools.

two_column_text_2_list.heading: Validate
two_column_text_2_list.text: Prototype, form, cure, machine, and inspect in Factory 1 using the right process — RTS or otherwise.

two_column_text_2_list.heading: Deploy
two_column_text_2_list.text: Scale production via a dedicated line installed near your facility, run by EXTNGO.

timeline_items.title: Design & Prototype Development
timeline_items.text: We design, build and test your idea/product

timeline_items.title: Low/Mid Volume Production
timeline_items.text: Delivered via our flexible factories with the optimal processing route

timeline_items.title: Dedicated Production Line
timeline_items.text: When ready to scale, we design and deploy a line tailored to your needs – no upfront CAPEX

factory_section_text.text:
Factory 1 in Gloucester provides complete end-to-end production, from raw material to finished assemblies.

With RTS systems, ISO Class 7 cleanroom environments, large-format autoclaves, press moulding, CNC machining, metrology and forming technologies, every part follows its optimal manufacturing route.

data.two_column_text_3_title: From Locked Systems to Open Manufacturing

two_column_text_3_list.heading: The old World
two_column_text_3_list.text:
Automated Material Placement Systems for composites have existed for decades, but they require extreme CAPEX and personnel investment to setup and operate, while offering no performance or cost advantage vs manual layup.
Composites automation is still locked behind technical and cost barriers.

two_column_text_3_list.heading: The EXTNGO System
two_column_text_3_list.text: We set-up and operate the production lines for you, delivering unbeatable cost, quality and performance.

data.banner_cta_title: Others optimize for the old world. We build what the next one needs.
data.banner_cta_description: Ask us to build the part no one else can.
data.meta_description: Transformational lightweighting solutions. We design and produce the world's lightest structures for the aerospace and automotive.
